name: kaeriten

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.5 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] A 返り点 directive carries kanbun return marks (一・二) attached to a character; rendered as kaeriten markup. Offsets from the §3 byte model; not read back from a processor.

source: 読［＃返り点 一・二］本

expected.html: 読［＃返り点 一・二］本
expected.serialize: 読［＃返り点 一・二］本
